title: Reinforcement Learning
description: Developing adaptive agents for complex decision-making in dynamic environments, with applications in robotics and autonomous systems.

title: Graph Neural Networks
description: Leveraging graph-structured data for spatial reasoning, environmental modeling, and relational learning across interconnected systems.

title: Computer Vision
description: Applying visual perception and object detection techniques to real-world monitoring, inspection, and environmental analysis tasks.

title: Environmental Intelligence
description: Using AI and sensor systems to monitor, predict, and respond to environmental phenomena including natural hazards and agricultural systems.

title: Meta Learning
description: Exploring learning-to-learn paradigms for fast adaptation and generalization across tasks with limited data.

title: Embodied AI
description: Building agents that perceive and act in physical or simulated environments through integrated sensing and decision-making.
